title: Computer and Information Sciences, General.
description: A general program that focuses on computing, computer science, and information science and systems.

title: Engineering, General.
description: A program that generally prepares individuals to apply mathematical and scientific principles to solve a wide variety of practical problems in industry, social organization, public works, and commerce.

title: Biology/Biological Sciences, General.
description: A general program of biology at the introductory, foundational level or a program in biology or the biological sciences that is undifferentiated as to title or content.

title: Registered Nursing/Registered Nurse.
description: A program that generally prepares individuals in the knowledge, techniques and procedures for promoting health, providing care for sick, disabled, infirmed, or other individuals or groups.

title: Business Administration and Management, General.
description: A program that generally prepares individuals to plan, organize, direct, and control the functions and processes of a firm or organization.
